channel.title: Miroslav Dzhokanov - Articles
channel.description: Articles about leadership, entrepreneurship, and raising resilient children by Miroslav Dzhokanov

item.title: Math or Language in the era of AI
item.description: Math or Language in the era of AI - which path prepares your child for a world where careers shift every decade? A data-grounded look at what skills actually matter.

item.title: Математика или езици в ерата на ИИ
item.description: Математика или езици в ерата на ИИ - кой път подготвя детето ви за свят, където професиите се сменят всяко десетилетие? Данни-основан поглед на умения, които наистина имат значение.

item.title: Какво е по-важно - успехът или щастието?
item.description: Често си казваме: когато постигна X, ще се отпусна или когато приключа Y, ще започна да се наслаждавам на живота. Но X и Y се случват и след кратък прилив на радост отново се връщаме към обичайното си състояние.

item.title: Къде да учи детето ми?
item.description: Къде да запиша детето си? Държавно или частно училище? Лично мнение за избора на училище в България, базирано на години наблюдение и личен опит.

item.title: Where Should My Child Study?
item.description: Where should I enroll my child? Public or private school? A personal perspective on choosing the right school, based on years of observation and experience.

item.title: What is More Important - Success or Happiness?
item.description: Success doesn't guarantee happiness. A reflection on what happiness actually is - not a feeling or destination, but something you build through enjoyment, satisfaction, and meaning.

item.title: How a Woman Chooses a Man
item.description: Reliability matters more than charm in long-term partnerships. A father's perspective on what women should look for in a man - and what men should demand in return.

item.title: How to Build Motivation
item.description: A conversation with high school students reveals practical insights about motivation - from doing what needs to be done to finding intrinsic drive.

item.title: Do Not Make Your Kid's Life Easy or Happy
item.description: Why making life too easy for children can be detrimental to their development and how to raise resilient, self-reliant adults.

item.title: The Tall Girl Problem
item.description: Exploring the modern dating landscape and the challenges of finding meaningful connections in today's society.

item.title: More Muscle - More Life
item.description: Multiple scientific research papers show correlation between muscle mass and longevity.

item.title: Building Self-Control: The Marshmallow Effect
item.description: Discover how to develop delayed gratification skills in children through the lens of the famous Stanford marshmallow experiment and practical parenting tips.

item.title: The Science of Effective Learning
item.description: Tips and tricks how to learn faster and more efficiently.
